programmes.show_description: From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Tracks with big TV connections! Could be theme tunes, adverts or just a song made famous by a TV show.
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Bruno Brookes guides you through the stats in disbelief! Three hours of top tunes from superstars like Bowie, Abba, Bob Marley, Queen, The Who and more. But why didn't we buy 'em?!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
11 pop-rock symphonies from Birmingham's Electric Light Orchestra. Including Livin' Thing, Mr Blue Sky, Don't Bring Me Down, Xanadu & their last top 10 Hold On Tight in 1981.
Robin Banks with seven hours of 70s songs that make you feel great! From disco and punk to ABBA classics and Queen anthems.
If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!
2 hours of disco babes who ruled the dancefloors! From Labelle & Lipps Inc to Tina Charles & Sister Sledge - it's all girl singers, all the way!

programmes.show_name: Earth Wind & Fire v Sunshine Band!
programmes.show_description: 45 minutes of funk & disco from 2 of the biggest feelgood bands of the decade!
If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!
T'Pau's Carol Decker isn't just a queen of the power ballad - she's also a secret disco diva! So dance yourself dizzy with her personal pick of 30 feel-good floor-fillers.
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the party hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
Come prepared, as those vocal chords are going to see a lot of action as we spend 3 nostalgic hours with Pat Sharp's 70s house party. All gatecrashers welcome!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the party hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
From disco to rock via Grease and Abba - these are the songs with the thirty biggest singalong hooks of the 70s!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the party hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
Incredible facts and amazing trivia about some of the decade's most famous songs and videos! This is two hours of Radio 1 legend Bruno Brookes asking 'Can You Believe It?!'
Over-bearded men and leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the West Coast, the underground and the counter culture of the 1970s.
5 hours of flashbacks from the swinging 60s! Including Johnny Cash, Sam Cooke, The Kinks, Lulu, The Beach Boys, The Beatles, The Troggs, Bob Dylan, The Rolling Stones & Elvis.
Over-bearded men and leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the West Coast, the underground and the counter culture of the 1970s.
Today we'd call it Cheesy Pop! Back then it was Bubblegum Pop & TISWAS Sally has a prime selection including David Cassidy, Mungo Jerry, Lynsey De Paul, Tony Orlando & The Osmonds.
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Music and passion were always the fashion! 25 exuberant and uplifting songs with Latin beats, feelgood videos and some of the biggest uplifting moments in pop!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
A complete rundown of the 30 biggest selling UK singles UK for 1976 - can you believe these were all hits 50 years ago? And if you thought Abba were at number 1 - think again!

programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
Simon Bates with 30 amazing songs of the 60s & 70s from artists whose fame & reputation will live on forever. Including Roy Orbison, Aretha Franklin, Dionne Warwick & The Beatles.

programmes.show_name: I'm Stone In Love With You!
programmes.show_description: Crackling vinyl, shag carpets & lava lamp glows - this is how we loved in the 70s! Oh James...
2 hours of love songs - most still sound great, but some you probably wished you'd never hear again. Sorry about that!
